extortion.description: Outdoor School offers an engaging educational experience in the outdoors, with campuses located in the scenic Alps of North East Victoria and unspoilt bushland. The school provides a curriculum that spans from Prep to Year 12, focusing on sustainable living and developing future-ready young people. It acknowledges the Traditional Custodians of the land and emphasizes respect for First Nations people within its community. Outdoor School aims to create a fun and powerful learning environment for students through immersive outdoor experiences
